name: agentville-launcher
description: Adds a 🌍 globe button to the Claude Code panel (and the status bar) that opens the Agentville desktop app — a live top-down town view of your Claude agents.

commands.title: Agentville: Add button to Claude panel (inject)
Agentville: Remove button from Claude panel

agentville.appPath.description: Absolute path to the Agentville repo (the folder containing dist/main.cjs and node_modules/electron). Required so the launcher can start the app.

agentville.autoInject.description: Automatically add the Agentville button to the Claude Code panel on startup and re-add it after Claude updates.

agentville.reinjectCheckHours.description: How often (hours) to re-check/re-add the button after Claude Code updates (0 = disabled).
